##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/contract/getContractBook 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/contract/getContractBook 
 ## 接口描述 
获取合同台账分页查询接口
1. 提供合同编码和合同名称的模糊查询
2. 提供合同性质，合同状态，合同类型等匹配筛选
3. 返回合同基本信息，已报销金额明细，已支付金额明细，印花税金额明细，条款金额明细等信息 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"comId","maxLength":"20","label":"%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9AID","exampleValue":"1111"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billId","maxLength":"20","label":"%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E5%88%9B%E5%BB%BA%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7ID","exampleValue":"202300000000000000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"globalSearch","maxLength":"50","label":"%E5%85%A8%E5%B1%80%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%EF%BC%9A%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%2F%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"payStampTaxFlag","maxLength":"1","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E5%BC%80%E5%90%AF%E4%BA%86%E5%8D%B0%E8%8A%B1%E7%A8%8E%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE","exampleValue":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"contractAttr","maxLength":"1","label":"%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E6%80%A7%E8%B4%A8","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%200-%E5%BD%92%E6%A1%A3%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%201-%E4%BB%98%E6%AC%BE%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%202-%E6%A1%86%E6%9E%B6%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"contractTypeSeqIdList","maxLength":"20","label":"%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depSeqIdList","maxLength":"20","label":"%E8%B4%A3%E4%BB%BB%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"supSeqIdList","maxLength":"20","label":"%E4%B9%99%E6%96%B9%E5%8D%95%E4%BD%8D%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"start","required":true,"label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B","exampleValue":"0"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"limit","required":true,"label":"%E5%88%86%E9%A1%B5%E5%A4%A7%E5%B0%8F","maxLength":"500","exampleValue":"10"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","required":true,"maxLength":"8","label":"%E6%96%B0%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001"}}]}]</restparamstable>

body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/contract/getContractBook

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/contract/getContractBook

接口描述

获取合同台账分页查询接口

  1. 提供合同编码和合同名称的模糊查询
  2. 提供合同性质，合同状态，合同类型等匹配筛选
  3. 返回合同基本信息，已报销金额明细，已支付金额明细，印花税金额明细，条款金额明细等信息

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"comId","maxLength":"20","label":"%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9AID","exampleValue":"1111"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billId","maxLength":"20","label":"%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E5%88%9B%E5%BB%BA%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7ID","exampleValue":"202300000000000000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"globalSearch","maxLength":"50","label":"%E5%85%A8%E5%B1%80%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%EF%BC%9A%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%2F%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"payStampTaxFlag","maxLength":"1","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E5%BC%80%E5%90%AF%E4%BA%86%E5%8D%B0%E8%8A%B1%E7%A8%8E%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE","exampleValue":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"contractAttr","maxLength":"1","label":"%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E6%80%A7%E8%B4%A8","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%200-%E5%BD%92%E6%A1%A3%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%201-%E4%BB%98%E6%AC%BE%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%202-%E6%A1%86%E6%9E%B6%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"contractTypeSeqIdList","maxLength":"20","label":"%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depSeqIdList","maxLength":"20","label":"%E8%B4%A3%E4%BB%BB%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"supSeqIdList","maxLength":"20","label":"%E4%B9%99%E6%96%B9%E5%8D%95%E4%BD%8D%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"start","required":true,"label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B","exampleValue":"0"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"limit","required":true,"label":"%E5%88%86%E9%A1%B5%E5%A4%A7%E5%B0%8F","maxLength":"500","exampleValue":"10"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","required":true,"maxLength":"8","label":"%E6%96%B0%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001"}}]}]}
